sections.heading: What's New & Improvements
items: Introduced a modern, compact UI with full Light and Dark mode support
Redesigned the Update and Changelog screens with beautiful new background colors
Fixed a routing issue where 'View full changelog history' failed to redirect properly

sections.heading: What's New
items: Hotfix: Resolved a critical issue with the in-app update checker and network routing
Performance optimizations for faster background data usage tracking
General stability enhancements and minor UI polish

sections.heading: What's New
items: In-app Update dialog — prompts you to upgrade whenever a new version is available
Changelog viewer — view what's new directly on the update prompt screen
Full Changelog history screen added under Settings → About

sections.heading: New Features
items: Added Privacy Policy link in the introduction screen
Ads now disappear instantly after a Premium purchase or Daily Reward
Added a dedicated Premium status banner and optimized reward logic
Added full English localization support for the Premium screen

sections.heading: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed UI text color visibility issues in light and dark themes
Prevented duplicate purchase prompts with double-tap protection

sections.heading: Improvements & Fixes
items: Completely rewrote and optimized the Ping Test core logic
Fixed application crash on Android 6.0 (API 23) devices
General bug fixes and stability improvements

sections.heading: New Features
items: Added changelog tracking system to display feature updates

sections.heading: Improvements
items: Performance improvements and background service optimizations

sections.heading: What's New
items: Initial release of Network Manager
Real-time network speed indicator in status bar
Per-app data usage tracking and monitoring
Speed Test — measure download, upload, and ping
Daily data and Wi-Fi usage notifications
